text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: G, h, i... n... cerely. There. Wait, now how do I go to the next line again?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, well this is an inconvenient time to be
getting a call.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Now then, if I'm in the middle of sending a
message, how do I pick up the phone?
